_comment: Frozen T2I evaluation set for Lance. Same as Phase 0 reference oracle so parity comparison is apples-to-apples. Neutral content (no NSFW). seed=42 across all prompts to keep cross-quant comparisons fair.

prompts.prompt: A red fox cautiously stepping through tall summer grass at golden hour, naturalistic, shallow depth of field.
A chef in a white apron plating a dish in a bright modern kitchen, soft window light.
Aerial view of a rugged coastline at sunset, waves crashing against cliffs, cinematic.
A quiet anime street scene at dusk, paper lanterns swaying gently in the breeze, cherry blossom petals drifting.
A Pixar-style 3D animated sloth reaching for a leaf, expressive eyes, soft studio lighting.
Rain-soaked neon alley in a cyberpunk city at night, reflections in puddles, no people.
A misty old-growth forest at dawn, shafts of light through tall pines, ferns on the forest floor.
Close-up macro shot of clear water pouring into a crystal glass, bubbles rising, soft natural backlight.
Portrait of an elderly grandmother smiling warmly, soft natural window light, kind eyes.
A vintage hand-lettered sign reading 'Open' hanging in a coffee shop window, warm interior lighting visible behind.
